message:
feat(persist): upstream-compatible listpack decoder (br-frankenredis-3g0p, s5su part b)

Standalone forward-iterating decoder over the Redis listpack binary
format (legacy_redis_code/redis/src/listpack.c). Consumed by the
upcoming RDB stream decoder (s5su-c/qi6z) and the DUMP/RESTORE
container-type support (v8s5-c/hycu).

Surface:
  * pub mod listpack in fr-persist
  * ListpackEntry enum: Integer(i64) | String(Vec<u8>)
    + to_bytes() convenience for decimal-int → bytes
  * ListpackError enum covering every malformed-input branch
  * parse_header(bytes) -> (total_bytes, num_elements)
  * decode_listpack(bytes) -> Vec<ListpackEntry>
  * LISTPACK_HEADER_SIZE / LISTPACK_HDR_NUMELE_UNKNOWN / LISTPACK_EOF constants

Covers every upstream encoding branch:
  * 7-bit uint (0xxxxxxx)
  * 6-bit str (10xxxxxx + data)
  * 13-bit signed int (110xxxxx + 1 byte, sign-extended)
  * 12-bit str (1110xxxx + 1 byte len + data)
  * 32-bit str (11110000 + u32 LE + data)
  * 16/24/32/64-bit signed int (11110001 / 11110010 / 11110011 / 11110100)
  * Backlen skip matches upstream's 1-to-5-byte variable encoding

11 unit tests in the same file (crates/fr-persist/src/listpack.rs):
empty listpack, 7-bit uint, 6-bit str, 32-bit int, 13-bit int positive
+ negative, 12-bit + 32-bit str (including 70kB long string requiring
3-byte backlen), 16/24/64-bit int, missing terminator, short header,
TotalBytesOutOfRange, int → decimal conversion. All 12 total in the
listpack module pass; fr-persist overall green; clippy clean.

No encoder — writes still go through the existing frankenredis-internal
path. Encoder lands in br-frankenredis-6zk9 (s5su-e).

Co-Authored-By: cc-redis <noreply@anthropic.com>
